title: Yueser 20 PCS DIY Graffiti Party Bag, Colouring Bag DIY Non-Woven Bag Tote Bag Graffiti Bag for Kids Eco Bag Arts Crafts Reusable Shopping Bag Gift Bag for Schools and Birthday
features: 🎨Product includes 20 doodle bags and 24 watercolour pencils.
🎨High quality material: Made of high quality nonwoven fabric, durable and environmentally friendly.
🎨Size: The bag is about 24cm long, the rope is 12cm long and 22.5cm wide. Easy to carry, easy to wash, colour disappears after washing, reusable.

🎨Different designs: Bags with 10 different patterned bags, mermaids, owls and unicorns, kangaroos and koalas, elephants and dinosaurs, bears fishing and bear frisbees, sharks and lions, cake bunnies and boy and girl rabbits, starfish and squid, hippos and cups, seaside girls and flamingos, children can fill in the colours to their liking.
🎨Widely used: Festive treats, birthday gifts, shopping bags, gift bags, green bags, school, kindergarten, packed lunches and even Halloween, Christmas etc.

🎨DIY Handmade Bags: To further promote the identification of colors and shapes for children and to encourage their hands-on creativity. They can design and paint according to their personal preferences - for imagination, concentration and craftsmanship.
